message:
test(proptest): add 99 property tests for TUI state reducer, schema gate, and lexical backend bridge

- proptest_tui_state.rs (51 tests): ListState navigation/clamping, pure
  reducer determinism, filter accumulation, toggle self-inverse, timeline
  zoom/scroll bounds, DataRefreshed clamping, search lifecycle, cycle
  profile/saved-search wrapping, SelectNext/Prev dispatch isolation,
  error lifecycle, triage expand/collapse
- proptest_schema_gate.rs (20 tests): SchemaField/SchemaSnapshot/
  SchemaGateResult serde roundtrips, check_schema_preservation reflexivity,
  superset safety, safe⟺invariant, field accounting, type widening/
  narrowing symmetry, T↔Option<T> lossiness, summary content properties
- proptest_lexical_backend_bridge.rs (28 tests): IngestLifecyclePolicy/
  LexicalSchemaVersion/DocumentSource parse↔as_str roundtrips, Display
  consistency, serde roundtrips, unknown-input defaults, config path
  detection, rate function bounds (churn/error/rejection), BridgeDocument
  serde with optional fields and metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
